description: Basic description of plasmas: collective phenomena and sheaths, collisional processes, single particle motions, fluid models, equilibria, waves, electromagnetic properties, instabilities, and introduction to kinetic theory and nonlinear processes. Examples from fusion, astrophysical and materials processing processing plasmas.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E 320orPHYSICS 322), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
